item.action: Summarize the complete verification-receipt set as a policy-bound SLSA Verification Summary Attestation without overstating trust.

progress.finding: A delegated verification result must bind one subject to the verifier, policy, resource URI, and complete set of input attestations; individual receipts alone are insufficient.
progress.verification: Five deterministic Node test cases are committed; runtime execution was not available in this connector-only run.
progress.trust_limit: The artifact is an unsigned statement and cannot establish signer authenticity, verifier integrity, deployment truth, or claim truth.

item.handoff: Cloudflare Research should generate one R-007 receipt per required check, hash each receipt, build this VSA, sign it with a configured trusted identity, and verify signer-verifier binding before evidence acceptance.
